What we offer

Services & pricing

Transparent, fixed-scope pricing — no surprise invoices. Every engagement starts with a free consultation.

What we build

End-to-end e-commerce — from first commit to launch day and beyond

🛒

PrestaShop Development

Custom themes, modules, API integrations, and full-store builds on PrestaShop 8. We know the platform inside out.

  • Custom theme design
  • Module development
  • Payment gateway setup
  • Performance tuning
📝

WordPress & WooCommerce

Content-rich sites and WooCommerce stores built for speed, SEO, and conversions — not just looks.

  • WooCommerce store setup
  • Custom theme / child theme
  • Plugin development
  • Gutenberg blocks
🚀

Store Migrations

Move from Magento, Shopify, OpenCart, or any legacy platform to PrestaShop or WooCommerce with zero data loss.

  • Products & categories
  • Customers & order history
  • SEO URL preservation
  • Post-migration QA
⚡

Performance & SEO

Core Web Vitals, technical SEO audits, structured data, and image pipelines — measurable results, not guesswork.

  • Core Web Vitals audit
  • Technical SEO fixes
  • Schema / structured data
  • CDN & caching setup
🔧

Custom Integrations

Connect your store to payment gateways, ERPs, CRMs, shipping providers, and third-party APIs.

  • Razorpay / PayU / Stripe
  • ERP & CRM sync
  • Shipping API setup
  • Webhook automation
🛡️

Maintenance & Support

Monthly retainers so your store stays fast, secure, and up to date without you thinking about it.

  • Security patches
  • Regular backups
  • Uptime monitoring
  • Priority bug fixes

Project pricing

Fixed-price packages for new store builds

Starter

Get online fast

  • Up to 100 products
  • Mobile-responsive theme
  • 1 payment gateway
  • Basic SEO setup

Most popular

Growth

₹1,49,999 one-time
  • Everything in Starter
  • Unlimited products
  • Custom theme design
  • Up to 3 integrations
  • Full SEO + sitemap setup
  • Performance optimisation
  • 90-day post-launch support
Start your project →

Enterprise

Complex requirements

Custom
  • Everything in Growth
  • Multi-store / multi-language
  • Custom modules & APIs
  • ERP / CRM integration

  • SLA-backed support retainer
Talk to us →

All prices exclude GST. Hosting not included. Talk to us if your needs don't fit a package.

Common questions

How long does a typical project take?

Starter builds usually take 3–4 weeks. Growth projects are 6–10 weeks depending on complexity. We give you a firm timeline before any work begins.

Do you work with clients outside India?

Yes. We work with clients across India, the Middle East, and Europe. All communication is in English and we adjust working hours for international time zones.

What's included in post-launch support?

Bug fixes for issues directly related to our work are covered free for the support period in your plan. After that, a retainer or ad-hoc hourly rate applies.

Can I upgrade my plan mid-project?

Yes. If requirements grow after the project starts, we'll scope the changes, agree on a revised price, and adjust the timeline accordingly.

Not sure which plan fits?

Tell us about your project and we'll recommend the right approach — no strings attached.

Get a free quote
